info.title: Open Triathlon Coach for ChatGPT API
info.description: Production OAuth Action for the authenticated user's own Intervals.icu data. Supports read-only coaching analysis plus consequential calendar creation and selected wellness updates. Athlete-scoped endpoints are fixed to /athlete/0. No delete operations are exposed.

contact.name: Open Triathlon Coach for ChatGPT project

intervalsOAuth.description: Per-user Intervals.icu OAuth. Configure the client ID and secret only in the ChatGPT Action editor. Never commit credentials. WRITE includes READ for the same Intervals.icu category.

scopes.ACTIVITY:READ: Read completed activities and performance data
scopes.WELLNESS:WRITE: Read and update selected wellness and recovery data
scopes.CALENDAR:WRITE: Read calendar data and create planned workouts or events
scopes.SETTINGS:READ: Read athlete profile, sport settings, thresholds, zones, routes and related settings data

get.summary: Get athlete with sport settings and custom items
get.description: Returns the athlete account. Do not report numeric threshold_pace directly: it is speed in m/s. Example: 3.42 means about 4:52/km or 7:50/mi, not 3:25/km.

401.description: OAuth connection is missing, invalid or no longer authorized.

403.description: The user did not grant the scope required for this operation.

429.description: Intervals.icu rate limit reached. Respect Retry-After and do not retry repeatedly.

get.summary: Get athlete profile info
get.description: Returns the authenticated athlete's profile, including weight, timezone, country and basic account settings.

401.description: OAuth connection is missing, invalid or no longer authorized.

403.description: The user did not grant the scope required for this operation.

429.description: Intervals.icu rate limit reached. Respect Retry-After and do not retry repeatedly.

get.summary: Get the athlete's current training plan
get.description: Returns details of the authenticated athlete's currently assigned training plan.

401.description: OAuth connection is missing, invalid or no longer authorized.

403.description: The user did not grant the scope required for this operation.

429.description: Intervals.icu rate limit reached. Respect Retry-After and do not retry repeatedly.

get.summary: List all sport settings for the athlete
get.description: Returns sport settings. Numeric threshold_pace is speed in m/s, never decimal minutes. Convert 3.42 m/s to about 4:52/km or 7:50/mi and cross-check pace zones.

401.description: OAuth connection is missing, invalid or no longer authorized.

403.description: The user did not grant the scope required for this operation.

429.description: Intervals.icu rate limit reached. Respect Retry-After and do not retry repeatedly.

get.summary: Get sport settings by sport type (e.g. Ride, Run, Swim)
get.description: Returns one sport's settings. Numeric threshold_pace is m/s. Convert with 1000/speed for sec/km or 1609.344/speed for sec/mi; never parse it as minutes.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Sport type e.g. Ride, Run, Swim, or the settings id

401.description: OAuth connection is missing, invalid or no longer authorized.

403.description: The user did not grant the scope required for this operation.

429.description: Intervals.icu rate limit reached. Respect Retry-After and do not retry repeatedly.

get.summary: List activities for a date range
get.description: Lists activities for a date range with sport, duration, distance, load and available performance metrics. Present values in the user's preferred unit system.

parameters.name: newest
parameters.description: End date ISO-8601, defaults to now

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Return at most this many activities

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma separated field names to include (default all)

401.description: OAuth connection is missing, invalid or no longer authorized.

403.description: The user did not grant the scope required for this operation.

429.description: Intervals.icu rate limit reached. Respect Retry-After and do not retry repeatedly.

get.summary: Get full detail for a single activity
get.description: Returns full details for one activity. Set intervals=true to include interval data when available.

parameters.name: intervals
parameters.description: Set to true to include interval data

401.description: OAuth connection is missing, invalid or no longer authorized.

403.description: The user did not grant the scope required for this operation.

429.description: Intervals.icu rate limit reached. Respect Retry-After and do not retry repeatedly.

get.description: Returns detected or manually defined intervals for an activity, including duration, distance and available power, pace, heart-rate and training-load data.

401.description: OAuth connection is missing, invalid or no longer authorized.

429.description: Intervals.icu rate limit reached. Respect Retry-After and do not retry repeatedly.

get.summary: List wellness records for a date range
get.description: Lists wellness records including load, recovery, sleep, HRV, resting heart rate, weight and steps. Convert weight and other units to the user's preference.

parameters.name: fields

put.summary: Update wellness record for a date
put.description: Updates only the supplied wellness fields for one date. This changes the user's Intervals.icu account and must be used only after explicit confirmation.

get.summary: List planned workouts and calendar events
get.description: Lists planned workouts and calendar events for a date range, including races, notes, holidays, sickness and injury markers.

post.summary: Create a planned workout or event on the calendar
post.description: Creates a planned workout or calendar event. This changes the user's Intervals.icu account and must be used only after explicit confirmation of the date and details.

parameters.name: upsertOnUid
parameters.description: Must be false. This Action creates a new event and does not silently update an existing event with the same UID.

category.description: WORKOUT, RACE_A, RACE_B, RACE_C, NOTE, HOLIDAY, SICK, INJURED, TARGET

start_date_local.description: ISO-8601 local date or local datetime appropriate to the athlete's timezone.

type.description: Sport type e.g. Ride, Run, Swim

401.description: OAuth connection is missing, invalid or no longer authorized.

403.description: The user did not grant the scope required for this operation.
